name: Alaric
bio: Alaric was once a bright-eyed warrior, hailing from the remnants of the fallen kingdom in the south, just like his mentor Baldric. He grew up hearing stories of Baldric's unyielding strength and unmatched dedication to the old kingdom's cause. Inspired by the tales, Alaric sought out the legendary Templar Knight, swearing loyalty to him.

Despite his youth, Alaric is battle-hardened, having endured countless skirmishes in the hostile lands of the south. Though less experienced than Baldric, Alaric is fiercely devoted, seeing himself as a soldier who still fights for the ideals of honor and justice that once defined the fallen kingdom.

He is bold and unafraid, always the first to charge into battle alongside Baldric, whom he respects not just as a leader but as a father figure. Alaric has no illusions of glory; his only desire is to avenge his lost kingdom and uphold the Templar code.
A remnant of a fallen southern kingdom; later seen 'turned in an instant' alongside the templars he led, implying corruption or manipulation.

He had been the youngest of Solandis's Templars to walk out of that kingdom's last stand alive, still believing -- against everything that had happened there -- that devotion given honestly could not be turned against itself. It is a bitter irony of his story that it was.
